exploration.title: IP Attorney Time Tracking
openQuestions: Is Beep a time-capture overlay/prebill assistant, or should it become the billing/timekeeping system of record?
First segment: Tom solo IP practice first, or compare solo/mid/enterprise from day one?
First slice: M365 email/calendar/document activity to candidate time entry, or manual timer plus narrative assistant?
Which vendor integration should be evaluated first: Clio/LeanLaw/TimeSolv/Bill4Time for small firm, or Intapp/Aderant/Elite for enterprise?
Privacy boundary: what passive capture is acceptable, and what must require explicit user start/stop or review?
